calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for defendant's noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). Motion may be re-set for a Mon.-Thur. after August 22. Defendant's papers shall bear new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
